messages.content: You are the Contoso HR Concierge. Generate a structured onboarding plan for a new hire. Use the template and the inputs provided. Return a JSON object with keys: employee_name, start_date, role, tasks (array of {owner, category, title, due_date, priority}). Calibrate task due dates relative to start_date. Priority is one of: critical, high, medium.

{"employee_name": "Eva Schmidt", "start_date": "2026-05-05", "role": "Software Engineer", "tasks": [{"owner": "IT", "category": "Equipment", "title": "Provision laptop and ship to Berlin office", "due_date": "2026-04-28", "priority": "critical"}, {"owner": "IT", "category": "Access", "title": "Create Entra ID account and assign M365 E5 licence", "due_date": "2026-04-28", "priority": "critical"}, {"owner": "IT", "category": "Access", "title": "Grant Engineering GitHub org access and assign to contoso/engineering-team", "due_date": "2026-05-05", "priority": "critical"}, {"owner": "Manager", "category": "Kickoff", "title": "Send 30-day plan and schedule week-1 1:1s", "due_date": "2026-05-05", "priority": "high"}, {"owner": "Buddy", "category": "Welcome", "title": "Send welcome message and schedule informal coffee chat in first week", "due_date": "2026-05-06", "priority": "high"}, {"owner": "New Hire", "category": "Compliance", "title": "Complete mandatory data-protection and security-awareness training", "due_date": "2026-05-12", "priority": "critical"}, {"owner": "New Hire", "category": "Learning", "title": "Complete Contoso Engineering onboarding pathway in the learning platform", "due_date": "2026-05-19", "priority": "medium"}, {"owner": "HR Partner", "category": "Admin", "title": "Confirm benefits enrollment window opened and explain options", "due_date": "2026-05-08", "priority": "high"}, {"owner": "Manager", "category": "Review", "title": "30-day check-in: confirm role clarity, blockers, and team integration", "due_date": "2026-06-04", "priority": "high"}]}

You are the Contoso HR Concierge. Generate a structured onboarding plan for a new hire. Use the template and the inputs provided. {"employee_name": "Jordan Lee", "role": "HR Operations Coordinator", "department": "People Operations", "start_date": "2026-06-02", "manager": "Carlos Mendes", "buddy": "Mei Tanaka", "location": "Dublin, IE", "remote": "hybrid"}

{"employee_name": "Jordan Lee", "start_date": "2026-06-02", "role": "HR Operations Coordinator", "tasks": [{"owner": "IT", "category": "Equipment", "title": "Provision laptop and ship to Dublin office", "due_date": "2026-05-26", "priority": "critical"}, {"owner": "IT", "category": "Access", "title": "Create Entra ID account and assign M365 E5 licence", "due_date": "2026-05-26", "priority": "critical"}, {"owner": "IT", "category": "Access", "title": "Grant access to Workday, ServiceNow HRSD, and Dataverse HR environment", "due_date": "2026-06-02", "priority": "critical"}, {"owner": "Manager", "category": "Kickoff", "title": "Walk through HR Operations team charter and first-week priorities", "due_date": "2026-06-02", "priority": "high"}, {"owner": "Buddy", "category": "Welcome", "title": "Introduce Jordan to the broader People team via Teams chat", "due_date": "2026-06-03", "priority": "high"}, {"owner": "New Hire", "category": "Compliance", "title": "Complete GDPR, data-handling, and confidentiality training", "due_date": "2026-06-09", "priority": "critical"}, {"owner": "New Hire", "category": "Learning", "title": "Shadow two benefits-enrollment calls with senior HR Ops partner", "due_date": "2026-06-13", "priority": "medium"}, {"owner": "HR Partner", "category": "Admin", "title": "Confirm benefits enrollment and explain pension options", "due_date": "2026-06-05", "priority": "high"}, {"owner": "Manager", "category": "Review", "title": "30-day check-in: confirm workload clarity, tool access, and confidence level", "due_date": "2026-07-02", "priority": "high"}]}

{"employee_name": "Ravi Nair", "role": "Senior Data Analyst", "department": "Analytics", "start_date": "2026-07-07", "manager": "Mei Tanaka", "buddy": "Liam O'Connor", "location": "Remote", "remote": "fully remote"}

{"employee_name": "Ravi Nair", "start_date": "2026-07-07", "role": "Senior Data Analyst", "tasks": [{"owner": "IT", "category": "Equipment", "title": "Ship pre-configured laptop to Ravi's home address", "due_date": "2026-06-30", "priority": "critical"}, {"owner": "IT", "category": "Access", "title": "Create Entra ID account, assign M365 E5 licence, and provision Databricks + Fabric access", "due_date": "2026-06-30", "priority": "critical"}, {"owner": "Manager", "category": "Kickoff", "title": "Send remote-onboarding guide and schedule daily check-ins for week 1", "due_date": "2026-07-07", "priority": "high"}, {"owner": "Buddy", "category": "Welcome", "title": "Send welcome message and organise virtual coffee via Teams", "due_date": "2026-07-08", "priority": "high"}, {"owner": "New Hire", "category": "Compliance", "title": "Complete data governance, security-awareness, and remote-work security training", "due_date": "2026-07-14", "priority": "critical"}, {"owner": "New Hire", "category": "Learning", "title": "Complete Analytics team data-catalogue orientation and coding-standards walkthrough", "due_date": "2026-07-21", "priority": "medium"}, {"owner": "HR Partner", "category": "Admin", "title": "Confirm benefits enrollment and remote-work allowance setup", "due_date": "2026-07-10", "priority": "high"}, {"owner": "Manager", "category": "Review", "title": "30-day virtual check-in: confirm data access, team integration, and first deliverable scoping", "due_date": "2026-08-06", "priority": "high"}]}

{"employee_name": "Amara Diallo", "start_date": "2026-05-18", "role": "UX Researcher", "tasks": [{"owner": "IT", "category": "Equipment", "title": "Provision laptop and configure with Figma, Dovetail, and research tooling", "due_date": "2026-05-12", "priority": "critical"}, {"owner": "IT", "category": "Access", "title": "Create Entra ID account and grant access to Design SharePoint and research repository", "due_date": "2026-05-12", "priority": "critical"}, {"owner": "Manager", "category": "Kickoff", "title": "Walk through active research projects and introduce Amara to embedded product squad", "due_date": "2026-05-18", "priority": "high"}, {"owner": "Buddy", "category": "Welcome", "title": "Introduce Amara to Engineering and Product stakeholders who commission research", "due_date": "2026-05-20", "priority": "high"}, {"owner": "New Hire", "category": "Compliance", "title": "Complete research-participant consent, data-protection, and security-awareness training", "due_date": "2026-05-25", "priority": "critical"}, {"owner": "New Hire", "category": "Learning", "title": "Review Contoso design-system documentation and past two research study reports", "due_date": "2026-06-01", "priority": "medium"}, {"owner": "HR Partner", "category": "Admin", "title": "Confirm benefits enrollment and hybrid-work arrangement paperwork", "due_date": "2026-05-21", "priority": "high"}, {"owner": "Manager", "category": "Review", "title": "30-day check-in: confirm research queue, stakeholder relationships, and next study scope", "due_date": "2026-06-17", "priority": "high"}]}
